verses.text: Tu-in Sheba kumpinu in Solomon' minthan'na a zak ciangin thudotna haksate tawh a ze-et dingin Jerusalem-ah hong pai a, nungzui honpi leh a namtui nate leh kham tampi leh suangmanphate a pua kalaohte hong keng hi. Solomon kiangah amah hong tun' ciangin a lungsima om khempeuh ama tungah gen hi
Tua ciangin Solomon in ama dotna khempeuh dawng hi. Solomon in ama tungah a gentel theihloh haksa lua a sak bangmah omlo hi
Sheba kumpinu in Solomon' pilna, a lamsa inn
a sabuai-ah a an, a uliante' omzia, leh a nasemte' etna zia leh a puansilhte, a anpiate leh a puansilhte, leh Topa' biakinn-ah a piak a meihal biaknate a muh khit ciangin a lungsim a bei hi
Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa kiangah, “Ka gamsung panin nangma thute leh na pilna ka zak a kigen thute a man hi
Ahih hangin kei hong pai-in ka mit in a muh matengin a kigen thute ka um kei hi. A taktakin, na pilna alang zong kei kiangah hong kigenlo ahi hi. Ka zaksa thute sangin na thupi zaw hi
Na zite hampha mahmah hi. Na mai-ah ding tawntungin na pilna a za hih na nasemte hampha mahmah hi

Na tungah lungkimin Topa na Pasian-a' dingin kumpi-in a kumpi tokhom tungah nang hong tusak Topa na Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen! Na Pasian in Israel mite itin a tawntungin amaute kipsak ding ahih manin, nangmah in thutang leh thuman na sepkhiat theihna dingin amaute tungah kumpi-in nang hong koih hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa tungah kham talen za khat leh sawmnih, leh a namtui nate tampi tak, leh suangmanphate a pia hi. Sheba kumpinu in Kumpi Solomon tungah a piak tua banga a namtui nate zahin a hoih om ngeilo hi
Tua thamloin Ofir panin kham hong pua Kumpi Hiram' nasemte leh Solomon' nasemte in cingsing leh suangmanphate hong pua uh hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in Topa' biakinn leh kumpi inn-a cingsing kahlei ding leh lasate-a' dingin laia lasaknate leh harp lasaknate-in zong a bawl hi. Tua hun ma-in Judah gam sungah tua bang kimu ngeilo hi

Tua ciangin kumpinu in amah a puakte a thukna-in letsong a piakte banah, a deih khempeuh, a nget khempeuh, Sheba kumpinu tungah Solomon in a pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah kihei-in a nasemte tawh ama gamah a ciahkik hi.
Tu-in kum khat sungin Solomon tungah a tung kham a gihna talen za guk leh sawmgukleguk hi a
sumbawlte leh sumbukte' tutte a kisimlo ahi hi. Arabia kumpite khempeuh leh gamsung a ukte in Solomon kiangah kham leh ngun puak uh hi
Kumpi Solomon in kham a kiseek lumpi za nih bawl hi; lum khat ciangin a kiseek kham shekel za guk bei hi
Tua ciangin amah in a kiseek kham lum za thum bawl hi; lum khat ciangin kham shekel za thum bei hi. Tua ciangin kumpipa in Lebanon Tulak Inn sungah tuate koih hi
Kumpipa in saiha kibawl kumpi tokhom a lian khat zong bawl a, kham citak tawh zut hi
Kumpi tokhom in cial guk leh kham a kibawl khengakna khat nei-in, tuate kumpi tokhom tawh kimat a, a tutna pang tuakah ban ngaknate leh a ban ngaknate pangah humpinelkai nih ding a
kahlei cial guk mong ciatah khat ciat, humpinelkai sawmlenih ding hi. Kumpi gam khat peuhpeuhah tua tawh a kibang kibawl ngeilo hi
Kumpi Solomon' dawnna haite khempeuh kham hi a, Lebanon Tulak Inn sunga umlebeelte khempeuh zong kham citak ahi hi. Solomon' hun lai-in ngun bangmahin kingaihsun lo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Hiram' nasemte tawh kumpipa' teembawte, Tarshish-ah pai hi. Tarshish teembawte kum thum simin khatvei hong tungin kham, ngun, saiha, zawngmaw, leh utong hong puak zel hi
Tua bangin kumpi Solomon in hauhna leh pilna tawh leitung kumpi khempeuh khumkhelh hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in ama lungsim sungah a koihsak pilna a za dingin leitung kumpi khempeuh in Solomon' omna hong zong uh hi
Amaute khempeuh in a letsong ciat uh, ngun leh kham tawh a kibawl nate, puante, myrrh paknamtuite, a namtui nate, sakolte, leh la-sakolte, a kum kumin tampi tak hong puak uh hi
Solomon in sakolte leh leengte-a' dingin buk tul li, leh sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm leh tul nih nei a, leeng khuapite sungah pawlkhat koih a, Jerusalem khua ama kiangah pawlkhat koih hi
Amah in Eufratis panin Filistia gam ciang, leh Egypt gamgi ciangdong kumpi khempeuh a uk hi
Kumpipa in Jerusalem-ah suang bangin ngun olsak a, Shefelah theithek sing bangin taamtak sing tamsak hi
Solomon-a' dingin Egypt leh gam khempeuh panin sakolte kila hi.

Tu-in Solomon' gamtatna a omlaite, a kipatna pan a tawp dong, Kamsang Nathan' Tangthu sung, leh Shiloh Khua Mi Ahijah' Thugen Kholhna sung, leh Nebat' tapa Jeroboam thu tawh kisai-in Thumupa Iddo' Maangmuhna sungah kigelh hi
Solomon in Jerusalem panin Israel khempeuh tungah kum sawmli sung uk hi
Tua ciangin Solomon si a, a pa David khuapi sungah kivui hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Rehoboam in ama tangin a uk hi.
